prompt_text:
### Demographics: 43-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 94.5 kg; Height 183.7 cm; BMI 28.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 144/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 8.3%; 3 months ago 8.8%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 203mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 207mg/dL; 3 months ago 185mg/dL; current 224mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 95.2kg; 9 months ago 95.3kg; 6 months ago 94.9kg; 3 months ago 89.6kg; current 94.5kg), Height (12 months ago 183.7cm; 9 months ago 183.7cm; 6 months ago 183.7cm; 3 months ago 183.7cm; current 183.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 28.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 144mmHg; 9 months ago 145mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 144mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 30U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 19U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; current 18mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 630mg/g; 9 months ago 702mg/g; 6 months ago 803mg/g; 3 months ago 641mg/g; current 757mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 61mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 143mg/dL; 9 months ago 146mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.9g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
